name: sports-betting-mcp
description: AI sports betting picks, odds, injuries & line movement for NBA, NHL, NCAAB. 9 tools including visual bet slip cards. 59.6% documented win rate across 1,353+ picks.
author: Sean Goudy

tools.name: get_todays_picks
tools.description: All AI picks for today with confidence, edges, and bet slip cards

tools.name: get_top_pick
tools.description: Highest-confidence pick of the day with visual bet slip image

tools.name: get_live_odds
tools.description: Live moneyline, spread, and totals from FanDuel/BetMGM

tools.name: get_win_rate
tools.description: Documented win rate with full record breakdown by sport

tools.name: get_line_movement
tools.description: Significant line shifts since market open

tools.name: analyze_game
tools.description: Full 12-agent analysis on a specific game

tools.name: get_system_status
tools.description: Health check — uptime, DB status, scheduler health
